title: Add comprehensive services section based on reference websites

requirements.text: Create a new Services page that lists all company formation and business support services offered, organized into clear categories (e.g., Company Formation, Registered Office Services, Business Support, Compliance Services)

quotes: take reference of these two websites, and put everything here in my website as they have

acceptanceCriteria: Services page displays multiple service categories with clear headings
Each service category contains a list of individual services
Services are presented in a clean, organized layout similar to reference sites
Page is accessible from main navigation

requirements.text: Expand the services catalog to include additional formation-related services such as: registered office address service, business address service, mail forwarding, director service, company secretary service, VAT registration, PAYE registration, and business bank account assistance

quotes: take reference of these two websites, and put everything here in my website as they have

acceptanceCriteria: Each additional service has a clear name and description
Services include key features or benefits
Pricing information is displayed where applicable
Services are organized logically within their categories

requirements.text: Add detailed service pages for major service offerings (company formation types, registered office, business support) that explain what each service includes, pricing tiers, and benefits

quotes: put everything here in my website as they have

acceptanceCriteria: Each major service has its own dedicated page with comprehensive information
Pages include service descriptions, features, pricing, and call-to-action buttons
Navigation between related service pages is intuitive
Content is structured with clear headings and sections

requirements.text: Update the home page to feature a services overview section showcasing the most popular or core services with brief descriptions and links to detailed service pages

quotes: put everything here in my website as they have

acceptanceCriteria: Home page includes a prominent services section
Section highlights 4-6 key services with icons or visual elements
Each service card links to its detailed service page
Section integrates seamlessly with existing home page design

requirements.text: Add a service comparison feature that allows users to compare different formation packages or service tiers side-by-side with feature lists and pricing

quotes: take reference of these two websites

acceptanceCriteria: Comparison table displays multiple packages/services in columns
Feature rows clearly indicate what's included in each tier
Pricing is prominently displayed for each option
Users can select a package directly from the comparison view

requirements.text: Enhance the navigation menu to include a Services dropdown or section that provides quick access to all service categories and popular individual services

quotes: put everything here in my website as they have

acceptanceCriteria: Main navigation includes a Services menu item
Dropdown or mega menu displays service categories
Users can navigate directly to specific services from the menu
Menu works consistently on both desktop and mobile views

constraints: Use the existing forest green and charcoal color scheme defined in the theme
Maintain consistency with existing layout components (Section, SiteLayout)
Ensure all new pages are added to the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx
Services content should be UK-focused and relevant to UK company formations
nonGoals: Integrating third-party booking or scheduling systems
Adding payment processing for individual services (beyond existing formation wizard flow)
Creating separate registration or login flows for services
Implementing real-time chat or customer support features
Modifying the existing formation wizard flow or backend order structure

required: Service category icon for Company Formation - modern geometric illustration in forest green (service-formation.dim_120x120.png)
Service category icon for Registered Office - building or address marker illustration in forest green (service-office.dim_120x120.png)
Service category icon for Business Support - handshake or support illustration in forest green (service-support.dim_120x120.png)
Service category icon for Compliance Services - checkmark shield illustration in forest green (service-compliance.dim_120x120.png)
Services hero banner - professional UK business office setting with subtle brand colors (services-hero.dim_1200x400.png)
